channel.title: BBC Weather - Forecast for Cardiff, GB

image.title: BBC Weather - Forecast for Cardiff, GB

item.title: Tonight: Light Cloud, Minimum Temperature: 8°C (46°F)
item.description: Minimum Temperature: 8°C (46°F), Wind Direction: south-westerly, Wind Speed: 14mph, Visibility: Very Good, Pressure: 1014mb, Humidity: 81%, UV Risk: 0, Pollution: Low, Sunset: 18:12 GMT

item.title: Thursday: Light Rain Showers, Minimum Temperature: 6°C (42°F) Maximum Temperature: 13°C (55°F)
item.description: Maximum Temperature: 13°C (55°F), Minimum Temperature: 6°C (42°F), Wind Direction: south-westerly, Wind Speed: 21mph, Visibility: Good, Pressure: 1007mb, Humidity: 84%, UV Risk: 1, Pollution: Low, Sunrise: 06:32 GMT, Sunset: 18:13 GMT

item.title: Friday: Light Rain, Minimum Temperature: 2°C (35°F) Maximum Temperature: 8°C (47°F)
item.description: Maximum Temperature: 8°C (47°F), Minimum Temperature: 2°C (35°F), Wind Direction: westerly, Wind Speed: 18mph, Visibility: Very Good, Pressure: 1001mb, Humidity: 69%, UV Risk: 2, Pollution: Low, Sunrise: 06:30 GMT, Sunset: 18:15 GMT
